steps.title: Find the total weight lost
steps.content:
The bear started at 528 pounds and ended at 501 pounds.
$$528 - 501 = 27 \text{ pounds}$$

steps.title: Divide weight lost by the daily loss rate
steps.content:
At a rate of 0.5 pounds per day, the number of days needed to lose 27 pounds is:
$$\text{days} = \frac{27}{0.5} = \frac{27}{\frac{1}{2}} = 27 \times 2 = 54$$
The brown bear weighed 501 pounds 54 days after entering hibernation.
